protocol_opportunities.name: Zone-based density targets + graft distribution plan template
protocol_opportunities.indication: When planning artifacts are not attached or density targets are not explicit.

protocol_opportunities.name: Safe-zone mapping + density-mapped grid planning
protocol_opportunities.indication: When donor limitations or long-term preservation risk is a concern.

protocol_opportunities.name: Punch parameter standardization (diameter/movement/depth control)
protocol_opportunities.indication: For FUE cases to reduce transection/scarring risk indicators.

protocol_opportunities.name: Hypothermic holding solution protocol (e.g., HypoThermosol/ATP-enhanced)
protocol_opportunities.indication: When graft out-of-body time is non-trivial or multi-batch implantation workflow is used.

protocol_opportunities.name: Out-of-body time (OBT) logging + hydration workflow standardization
protocol_opportunities.indication: When OBT is estimated or not recorded; especially in large sessions.

protocol_opportunities.name: Implantation workflow standardization (implanter vs forceps) + team role clarity
protocol_opportunities.indication: When implantation is mixed-role or technique varies within the case.

protocol_opportunities.name: Angle/direction QA checklist for recipient placement
protocol_opportunities.indication: When intra-op or day0 photos are available and directional consistency is assessable.

protocol_opportunities.name: Documentation integrity checklist (pre-op, day0, protocols, verification)
